info.description: This provides the REST API for Pulsar Functions operations
info.title: Pulsar Functions REST API

200.description: Fetches the list of built-in Pulsar functions

403.description: The requester doesn't have admin permissions

get.summary: Fetches the list of built-in Pulsar functions

200.description: Operation successful

503.description: Function worker service is now initializing. Please try again later.

data.description: The value with which you want to trigger the Pulsar Function

dataStream.description: The path to the file that contains the data with which you'd like to trigger the Pulsar Function
